name: Pentaho
description: Pentaho — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in ETL.

seo.title: Pentaho Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Pentaho analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Pentaho is a Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL tool.
pros: Pre-built connectors eliminate custom pipeline work
cons: Row or event-based pricing grows with data volume
review.best_for: Data teams centralizing sources into a warehouse
review.not_for: Projects with a single data source and no analytics needs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.

lock_in.reason: ETL with OSS core, workflows portable
